chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2469 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 1965/18 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A 9681/17 4. For Katcha Peshi. 13.02.2018. Mr. Shoukat Ali Pathan, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. Learned Counsel for the petitioner under the instructions of the petitioner does not press this petition, which is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE A.H.
